purpose: Alternate data table for the Portal 2 credits in the Portal 1-style presentation. It defines global credits and lyrics arrays consumed by portal2/portal1style/cake.js.
invariants: lyrics entries provide delay, text, nonewline, and clear fields because portal2/portal1style/cake.js reads those names directly.
credits remains an ordered array; scroll timing is derived from total credit character count.
The data omits Portal 1 asciiart/changepicture fields because the alternate Portal 2 runtime never renders picture art.
gotchas: Text is injected through string-form setTimeout in portal2/portal1style/cake.js, so unescaped double quotes in lyric or credit text can break playback.
The final lyric text differs slightly from portal2/cakedata.js, including a trailing space on the last "gone" entry.
